description_long: This is a large, cylindrical orange traffic barrel with three wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircling its body. The surface shows visible signs of wear, including scuffs, dirt, and some deformation, especially near the top and along the sides. The top section features a molded handle for easy lifting and placement, and the tip is slightly dented and irregular. The base is wide, flat, and dark, likely made of heavy rubber to provide stability and prevent tipping, with a textured, worn appearance. The object is constructed primarily from durable plastic with a rubber base, designed to be highly visible and withstand outdoor urban environments. No logos or text are visible, and the overall condition suggests it has been used extensively in real-world settings.
description: A large, orange traffic barrel with three white reflective stripes, a molded handle on top, and a wide, heavy black base. The surface is worn and dirty, showing signs of extensive use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the barrel's cleanest side, with all three white stripes clearly visible and the handle on top intact.
description_view_1: This side displays more dirt and scuff marks, especially on the middle stripe, and the surface appears slightly more deformed.
description_view_2: The barrel appears more compressed and dented, with the stripes slightly misaligned and the handle partially visible.
description_view_3: The most damaged and dirty side, with significant deformation at the top and heavy dirt accumulation on the lower stripes and base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Three wide, horizontal white reflective stripes evenly spaced around the barrel's body.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded and slightly dented, with a molded orange handle integrated into the top; the tip is solid and not hollow.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, flat, and circular, made of thick black rubber, providing stability and weight; it has a rough, worn texture.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on any side.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuffs, dirt, fading, and some deformation, especially at the top and along the sides.
